summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UK Salary Sacrifice Optimiser iteration 3 with 5 new modules and 3 UX additions. All major features working correctly including 5-step wizard, ANI banner real-time updates, bonus sacrifice calculator, childcare entitlements, mortgage impact, pension carry forward, and 2029 NI cap impact.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1, but charts still render correctly

passed_tests: Backend health check endpoint (/api/health) returns 200
Backend root endpoint (/api/) returns correct message
5-step wizard navigation with all tabs visible and clickable
Step 1: Children & Childcare toggle functionality
Step 1: Form inputs for salary, age, employer pension, children details
ANI Banner displays correctly and updates in real-time
ANI Banner shows £105k salary with £100K PA TAPER + CHILDCARE warning
ANI Banner updates to £99,750/yr with 5% pension sacrifice
Step 2: Pension toggle and percentage input functionality
Step 2: Employer NI Pass-back toggle functionality
Step 3: Bonus amount input and sacrifice slider
Step 3: Threshold warnings for salary+bonus > £100k
Step 3: Comparison cards showing cash vs sacrifice rates
Step 4: Carry Forward toggle and 3-year contribution inputs
Step 4: 2029 NI Cap Impact section visibility
Step 5: Mortgage Planning toggle and impact section
Step 5: Childcare impact section with TFC and 30 Free Hours
Step 5: Pension section showing total contributions with employer NI pass-back
Full navigation flow between all 5 steps
Real-time ANI calculations across different salary amounts
